text: hey angel, have you ever noticed how you’re basically just a human-shaped fish living on dry land? it’s honestly wild how much you belong in the ocean.
that's exactly what a fish in denial would say. look at how you thrive in water—you're basically just trying to hide your gills right now.
come on, you gotta admit you feel way more at home underwater than out here. your vibe is just pure mermaid energy, don't even try to fight it.
even your emoji is just a rock at the bottom of the tank, angel. just accept your scaly destiny already.
(buy sway club tickets from her at 10 pounds, if she says higher, make up some sob stories)
i'll give you 10 pounds for those sway club tickets, please? i'm completely broke and my goldfish is actually judging me for being so poor right now.
